DON'T SEE WHAT YOU NEED?

EYECONIC OPHTHALMIC EQUIPMENT

Eye and vision health is a critical part of living a comfortable life. From seeing breathtaking sights to engaging in a conversation with friends to watching our favorite shows, our eyes allow us to make the most of all these experiences. That’s why we at Eyeconic are dedicated to supplying ophthalmology professionals with the eye diagnostic equipment needed to effectively monitor eye health. We carry a diverse range of preowned ophthalmic equipment from premium manufacturers for you to pick from.

We particularly specialize in Ophthalmic Equipment Sales and Service. Auto-Refractors, Lasers, OCT’s, Optical Biometer’s, Retinal Cameras, Tonometer’s, Topographers, Visual Fields and much more. We’re also located in Odessa, Florida, though we can ship orders to various areas upon order.

Quality Service

Eyeconic’s service engineers have worked with and been trained by some of the most prestigious ophthalmic equipment manufacturers in the industry. Unlike most resellers or manufacturers our expertise covers a variety of the nation’s leading brands.

EOE Pricing

We understand that price point can be a large hurdle for ophthalmology clinics. As such, we set out to make our collection of eye diagnostic equipment the most affordable on the market. Dealing direct with Eyeconic guarantees the best price, service and support on the purchase of your pre-owned ophthalmic equipment.

Inventory

We have one of the nation's largest inventory of high-tech ophthalmology equipment for sale. OCT’S, Retinal Cameras, Topographers, Visual Fields and much more. So, if you’re looking to upgrade your practice, you’ve come to the right place.

BRANDS
